name: Chengdu Editorial Desk
shortBio: Maintains Chengdu coverage with a focus on panda logistics, food planning, tea-house culture, and relaxed but workable city pacing.
fullBio: The Chengdu Editorial Desk maintains guides, place pages, and planning coverage related to Chengdu. Its focus is helping readers connect panda-base timing, old-city and neighborhood choices, Sichuan food priorities, and slower tea-house culture into a route that still feels edited rather than overbuilt.
reviewProcess: Pages are reviewed for city pacing, panda and day-trip practicality, neighborhood logic, and whether the guidance still fits current Chengdu travel habits.
seoTitle: Chengdu Editorial Desk | China Travel Notes
seoDescription: Meet the desk that maintains Chengdu guides, place pages, and planning coverage on China Travel Notes.
